name: Proline Adult Cat Food - Chicken 1.2kg
description: Proline Adult Cat Food - Chicken , fully balanced all natural cat food with chicken protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. Processed Chicken Protein ( 35% ), Wheat, Corn, Wheat Bran, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Flavor, Rice, Brewer's Dry Yeast, Taurine(3a370), Preservatives and Antioxidants (E320 & E321). Iron(3B103), Iodine (3B202), Copper(3B405), Manganese (3B502), Zinc(3B603), Selenium(3B802) Vitamin A (3A672A), Vitamin D3(3A671), Vitamin E (3A700), Vitamin C (3A300), Vitamin B1 (3A821) , B2 (3A825i), B3 (Niacin-3A315) , B6 (3A831) , B12 (3A) ), B7 (Biotin-3A880) , B9 (Folic Acid-3A316), Vitamin K3 (3A710), Choline (3A890), Calcium Pantothenate (3A841) NUTRITIONAL VALUES NUTRITIONAL ADDITIONS Raw Protein 31% Vitamin A 15000 IU/kg Raw oil 12% Vitamin D3 1000 IU/kg Ash 8% Vitamin E 150mg/kg Raw Cellulose ( Fiber ) 3% Vitamin C 120mg/kg Taurine 1000mg/kg DAILY FEED TABLE 1 - 2 kg 30 - 45 g 3 - 4 kg 60 - 80 g 5 - 6 kg 100 - 120 g 7 - 8 kg 140 - 160 g
